Red Flag Description: Gross margin is "adjusted"; adjustment may be recurring or misclassified COGS.
Detection Method / Rule: Adjustment disclosed in claim text; no schedule provided.
Evidence Needed: Addback schedule + COGS policy + cloud export
What resolves it: Could reduce normalized GM and EBITDA

Red Flag Description: NRR definition not shown; possible cohort exclusions or reactivation treatment.
Detection Method / Rule: NRR stated with no definition in excerpt.
What resolves it: Retention overstated; impacts valuation and leverage

Red Flag Description: Revenue growth claim not yet tied to GL.
Detection Method / Rule: No GL tie-out provided in excerpt.
What resolves it: Top-line may be overstated or non-recurring
